body_txt: The Badass and Child Duo occurs when a badass takes it upon themselves, out of goodness, interest, or circumstances beyond their control, to protect a young kid (typically an unrelated orphan). The trope is also commonly known as the Lone Wolf and Cub , named after the 1970s Samurai Manga and film series Lone Wolf and Cub , the Trope Maker . The Badass and Child Duo is made up of two parts:   If they are not the main characters, their meeting will have taken place off-screen before the story even started. If main characters, their meeting will take place very early in the story, and their relationship will develop almost instantly into a Promotion to Parent Papa Wolf (or Mama Bear if the Badass is female) or Big Brother Instinct and an adopted child/sibling. Assuming heterogeneous genders, if the child is a little older (neonate-age) the child may develop a Precocious Crush which is usually not returned (although in the future it may be). Gender inverted versions and same-gendered version occur, but the pure version is the most common. This is probably because of their effectiveness at being foils of one another. Women and girls are generally expected to be physically weaker and "purer" than men and boys, and as a youth or child, the vulnerability given off to the audience is enhanced. This juxtaposed with the adult, physically strong man who is in some way broken by his dark past of terrible sins, is a potent contrast. The trope has origins in samurai manga. The Ur-Example is Osamu Tezuka 's 1960s manga and anime series Dororo , while the Trope Maker is the 1970s manga and film series Lone Wolf and Cub . Please don't mistake this trope for Papa Wolf or Mama Bear . To see the differences, please refer to the Analysis page . Compare Papa Wolf , Promotion to Parent , Morality Pet , Shoulder Teammate , Little Guy, Big Buddy and Brooding Boy, Gentle Girl . Also is a type of Odd Couple . Not to be confused with Badass and Baby , when a hero fights while holding a baby, usually to underscore how badass and heroic he is.
